title: 启用来宾服务接口组件
title_en: Enable the Guest Service Interface Component
code:
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
# --- 从虚拟机的 VSSD 定位来宾服务接口组件设置数据 ---
$vssd=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
$gsi=([wmi]$vssd.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_GuestServiceInterfaceComponentSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
# --- 启用: EnabledState=2 (Enabled), 默认为 3 (Disabled). 该属性为只读, 经 ModifyResourceSettings 下发修改 ---
$gsi.EnabledState=[uint16]2
$r=$vsms.ModifyResourceSettings($gsi.GetText(1))
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job }
# --- 回读 ---
$vssd2=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
$gsi2=([wmi]$vssd2.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_GuestServiceInterfaceComponentSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
$gsi2.EnabledState  # -> 2 表示已启用

# === CopyFilesToGuest 方法签名 (Msvm_GuestFileService) ===
# uint32 CopyFilesToGuest(string[] CopyFileToGuestSettings, [out] CIM_ConcreteJob REF Job)
#   每个 CopyFileToGuestSettings 元素 = Msvm_CopyFileToGuestSettingData.GetText(1) 序列化字符串
#   Msvm_CopyFileToGuestSettingData 属性: SourcePath(主机路径,可含环境变量), DestinationPath(来宾路径),
#     OverwriteExisting(bool), CreateFullPath(bool)
# 用法示例(要求来宾正在运行且集成服务在线):
#   $gfs=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_GuestFileService -Filter "__PATH like '%$($vm.Name)%'"
#   $cs=([wmiclass]"\\.\$($ns):Msvm_CopyFileToGuestSettingData").CreateInstance()
#   $cs.SourcePath='C:\host\a.txt'; $cs.DestinationPath='C:\guest\a.txt'
#   $cs.OverwriteExisting=$true; $cs.CreateFullPath=$true
#   $rc=$gfs.CopyFilesToGuest(@($cs.GetText(1))); if($rc.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rc.Job }
code_en:
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
# --- Locate the guest service interface component setting data from the VM's VSSD ---
$vssd=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
$gsi=([wmi]$vssd.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_GuestServiceInterfaceComponentSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
# --- Enable: EnabledState=2 (Enabled), default is 3 (Disabled). This property is read-only and is modified via ModifyResourceSettings ---
$gsi.EnabledState=[uint16]2
$r=$vsms.ModifyResourceSettings($gsi.GetText(1))
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job }
# --- Read back ---
$vssd2=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
$gsi2=([wmi]$vssd2.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_GuestServiceInterfaceComponentSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
$gsi2.EnabledState  # -> 2 indicates enabled

# === CopyFilesToGuest method signature (Msvm_GuestFileService) ===
# uint32 CopyFilesToGuest(string[] CopyFileToGuestSettings, [out] CIM_ConcreteJob REF Job)
#   Each CopyFileToGuestSettings element = Msvm_CopyFileToGuestSettingData.GetText(1) serialized string
#   Msvm_CopyFileToGuestSettingData properties: SourcePath (host path, may contain environment variables), DestinationPath (guest path),
#     OverwriteExisting(bool), CreateFullPath(bool)
# Usage example (requires the guest to be running with integration services online):
#   $gfs=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_GuestFileService -Filter "__PATH like '%$($vm.Name)%'"
#   $cs=([wmiclass]"\\.\$($ns):Msvm_CopyFileToGuestSettingData").CreateInstance()
#   $cs.SourcePath='C:\host\a.txt'; $cs.DestinationPath='C:\guest\a.txt'
#   $cs.OverwriteExisting=$true; $cs.CreateFullPath=$true
#   $rc=$gfs.CopyFilesToGuest(@($cs.GetText(1))); if($rc.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rc.Job }
output:
CREATED: WMITEST_guest_services state=3
GSI_BEFORE: EnabledState=3
GSI_AFTER: EnabledState=2
COPY_METHOD: Msvm_GuestFileService.CopyFilesToGuest IN=[CopyFileToGuestSettings:String] OUT=[Job:Reference, ReturnValue:UInt32]
COPY_SETTINGS_PROPS: Caption, CreateFullPath, Description, DestinationPath, ElementName, InstanceID, OverwriteExisting, SourcePath
ASSERT: PASS GuestServiceInterface enabled (EnabledState=2)
CLEANUP: DestroySystem rv=4096
CLEANUP_VERIFY: no leftover WMITEST_guest_services
notes: 来宾服务设置类为 Msvm_GuestServiceInterfaceComponentSettingData，通过 GetRelated 关联自虚拟机的 VSSD（Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData），不直接挂在 ComputerSystem 上。
EnabledState 在 MOF 中标记为只读，修改须经 Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService.ModifyResourceSettings 下发；默认值 3(Disabled)，启用时置为 2(Enabled)。
复制文件的方法名为 CopyFilesToGuest（复数形式），挂在 Msvm_GuestFileService（基类 Msvm_GuestService）上。

方法签名：uint32 CopyFilesToGuest(string[] CopyFileToGuestSettings, [out] CIM_ConcreteJob REF Job)；每个数组元素为 Msvm_CopyFileToGuestSettingData.GetText(1)（含 SourcePath/DestinationPath/OverwriteExisting/CreateFullPath）。返回值 0 表示成功，4096 表示异步作业。
CopyFilesToGuest 要求目标来宾正在运行且集成服务在线，离线虚拟机无法调用。
该类与方法自 build 9600 起提供。
notes_en: The guest service setting class is Msvm_GuestServiceInterfaceComponentSettingData, associated via GetRelated from the VM's VSSD (Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData); it is not attached directly to the ComputerSystem.

EnabledState is marked read-only in the MOF, so modifications must be committed via Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService.ModifyResourceSettings; the default value is 3 (Disabled), and it is set to 2 (Enabled) to enable the service.
The file copy method is named CopyFilesToGuest (plural form) and is attached to Msvm_GuestFileService (base class Msvm_GuestService).

Method signature: uint32 CopyFilesToGuest(string[] CopyFileToGuestSettings, [out] CIM_ConcreteJob REF Job); each array element is Msvm_CopyFileToGuestSettingData.GetText(1) (including SourcePath/DestinationPath/OverwriteExisting/CreateFullPath). A return value of 0 indicates success, and 4096 indicates an asynchronous job.
CopyFilesToGuest requires the target guest to be running with integration services online; it cannot be invoked on an offline VM.
This class and method have been available since build 9600.
